title: Vlocity DataRaptor Load DataPack Schema
description: Schema for Vlocity / OmniStudio DataRaptor Load DataPacks, supporting both managed package (%vlocity_namespace%) and native (OmniDataTransform) schema formats.

Name.description: The name of the DataRaptor Load, unique in the org.

InputType.description: The type of input format accepted.

OutputType.description: The type of output format produced (Salesforce SObjects).

GlobalKey.description: The global unique key for deployment/migration. Managed field: %vlocity_namespace%__GlobalKey__c, Native field: GlobalKey.

RollbackOnError.description: Rollback transaction on error. Managed field: %vlocity_namespace%__RollbackOnError__c, Native field: IsRollbackOnError.

UseAssignmentRules.description: Apply Salesforce Lead/Case assignment rules upon upsert. Managed field: %vlocity_namespace%__UseAssignmentRules__c.

CheckFieldLevelSecurity.description: Enforce field-level security checks when saving data. Managed field: %vlocity_namespace%__CheckFieldLevelSecurity__c, Native field: IsFieldLevelSecurityEnabled.

IgnoreErrors.description: Whether to ignore errors for individual mapping rows. Managed field: %vlocity_namespace%__IgnoreErrors__c, Native field: IsErrorIgnored.

OverwriteAllNullValues.description: Include null values in save operation. Managed field: %vlocity_namespace%__OverwriteAllNullValues__c, Native field: IsNullInputsIncludedInOutput.

Mappings.description: List of mapping items defining target SObject insertions and updates.

DomainObjectAPIName.description: The target SObject field API name being written to, e.g. 'Account:Phone', 'Account:Name'. Managed field: %vlocity_namespace%__DomainObjectAPIName__c, Native field: DomainObjectAPIName.

InterfaceFieldAPIName.description: The input JSON path mapping source, e.g., 'AccountPhone', 'AccountName' or formula string. Managed field: %vlocity_namespace%__InterfaceFieldAPIName__c, Native field: InterfaceFieldAPIName.

InterfaceObjectName.description: The SObject type to write to, e.g. 'Account', 'Contact'. Managed field: %vlocity_namespace%__InterfaceObjectName__c, Native field: InterfaceObjectName.

DomainObjectFieldAPIName.description: The specific field API name on the SObject (corresponds to the property after colon in DomainObjectAPIName).

DomainObjectCreationOrder.description: Determines step sequence order in writing objects. Objects with creation order 1 are created before order 2, enabling parent-child ID mapping. Managed field: %vlocity_namespace%__DomainObjectCreationOrder__c, Native field: DomainObjectCreationOrder.

IsUpsertKey.description: Mark this field as a unique identifier for upsert operations (matching records to update instead of insert). Managed field: %vlocity_namespace%__UpsertKey__c, Native field: UpsertKey.

IsRequiredForUpsert.description: Indicates if this mapping item must have a value for upsert to proceed. Managed field: %vlocity_namespace%__IsRequiredForUpsert__c, Native field: IsRequiredForUpsert.

IsDisabled.description: Whether this mapping item is currently disabled. Managed field: %vlocity_namespace%__IsDisabled__c, Native field: IsDisabled.
